identity: Research Radar Lab: claim provenance, baseline/null, falsifier and evidence roadmap.

validation_layer.name: veritas-sys
validation_layer.role: reject unsupported or overclaimed research signals

processing_layer.name: eval
processing_layer.role: compare claim against baseline and null

observation_layer.name: observer
observation_layer.role: observe what the cycle actually read and rejected

observation_layer.name: autologica-operativa
observation_layer.role: make rule origin and retire_when explicit

generation_layer.name: cascata
generation_layer.role: propagate accepted constraints into next cycle

generation_layer.name: blueprint-genesis
generation_layer.role: open alternatives when claim architecture is ambiguous

interface_layer.name: scribe
interface_layer.role: write claim cards and evidence roadmap

use_dynamics: ingest public research claims and source cards
map each claim to observable evidence, baseline and falsifier
separate novelty from archive echo, marketing hype and benchmark leakage
produce decision constraints: watch, test, reject, or promote
modus_invocation.success_condition: The first cycle produces at least one claim card with source provenance, explicit baseline/null, falsifier status, and a next experiment or rejection reason.
